title: boehmeria caudata var. scabrella
intro: Boehmeria caudata var. scabrella, also known as Chinese nettle, is a type of plant that belongs to the nettle family (Urticaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Boehmeria caudata var. scabrella include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or poultices, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
